strategyGames.title: Catan
strategyGames.description: The classic resource trading and settlement building game. Collect and trade resources like wood, brick, wheat, ore, and sheep to build roads, settlements, and cities on the island of Catan. A must-have for any board game collection.

games.title: Catan
games.description: The classic resource trading and settlement building game. Collect and trade resources like wood, brick, wheat, ore, and sheep to build roads, settlements, and cities on the island of Catan. A must-have for any board game collection.

games.title: Catan: Traders & Barbarians
games.description: An expansion pack for Catan that adds new scenarios and mechanics, including trading with caravans, defending against barbarians, and fishing. It offers fresh challenges and variety to the base game.

strategyGames.title: Ticket to Ride
strategyGames.description: A cross-country train adventure where players collect cards to claim railway routes connecting cities. Simple to learn, strategically deep, and endlessly replayable.

games.title: Ticket to Ride
games.description: The original North America edition. Connect cities across the United States and Canada.

games.title: Ticket to Ride: Europe
games.description: Explore European cities with new mechanics like tunnels, ferries, and train stations.

strategyGames.title: Splendor
strategyGames.description: A gem-collecting and card development game where players take on the role of Renaissance merchants, acquiring mines, transportation, and artisans to earn prestige points.

games.title: Splendor
games.description: The original engine-building game of gem trading and prestige.

games.title: Splendor Marvel
games.description: The Marvel-themed edition with Infinity Stones and iconic characters replacing gems and nobles.

strategyGames.title: Carcassonne
strategyGames.description: A tile-placement game where players draw and place tiles to build the medieval landscape of the fortified city. Deploy your followers as knights, thieves, monks, or farmers to score points. Simple rules with deep strategic possibilities.

strategyGames.title: Pandemic
strategyGames.description: A cooperative board game where players work together as a team of disease-fighting specialists to treat infections and find cures for four deadly diseases before they spread across the globe. Teamwork and strategy are essential to save humanity.

strategyGames.title: King of Tokyo
strategyGames.description: A dice-rolling monster battle game where giant creatures compete to become the King of Tokyo. Roll dice to attack, heal, gain energy, or score victory points. Last monster standing or first to 20 points wins. Fast-paced and full of surprises.

partyAndCardGames.title: Dixit
partyAndCardGames.description: A creative storytelling card game with beautifully illustrated cards. One player gives a clue about their card, and others choose cards that match the clue. The goal is to be creative enough that some, but not all, players guess your card. Sparks imagination and laughter.

partyAndCardGames.title: Exploding Kittens
partyAndCardGames.description: A hilarious and strategic card game of cat-powered Russian Roulette. Draw cards until someone draws an Exploding Kitten and is out of the game — unless they have a Defuse card.

games.title: Exploding Kittens
games.description: The original party game. Simple rules, unpredictable outcomes, and lots of laughs.

games.title: Imploding Kittens: Expansion
games.description: The expansion adding new cards and shared mechanics to the base game.

partyAndCardGames.title: UNO Family
partyAndCardGames.description: The world's most popular card game family. Match colors and numbers, play action cards, and be the first to empty your hand. Don't forget to shout UNO!

games.title: UNO
games.description: The classic card game of matching colors and numbers with action cards like Skip, Reverse, and Draw Two.

games.title: UNO Flip!
games.description: A double-sided deck adds a new twist. Flip the deck to reveal a whole new set of tougher action cards.

games.title: UNO No Mercy
games.description: The most ruthless version yet with brutal new rules like Draw 6, Draw 10, and Skip Everyone cards.

games.title: DOS
games.description: The sequel to UNO where matching two cards in the center row is the key to winning. A fresh twist on the classic formula.

partyAndCardGames.title: Rummikub
partyAndCardGames.description: A timeless tile-based game where players arrange numbered tiles into groups (same number, different colors) and runs (consecutive numbers, same color). Strategic planning, pattern recognition, and a bit of luck make every round engaging.
